title: Phase 1A Repair & Recovery Core
summary: First premium implementation-prep lane for Vietnam, centered on the moments where travelers get stuck fastest after the free first sentence stops being enough.
whyFirst: This lane turns the premium promise into repair, clarification, confidence, and cost-control under pressure before spending depth on softer or lower-stakes categories.

scenarios.whyIncluded: Repair language multiplies value across every other category and is the clearest premium proof for 'do not get stuck'.
Billing confusion is high-stakes because it combines stress, embarrassment, and direct cost exposure.
Ride and pickup failures escalate quickly, so premium should cover route correction and wrong-vehicle recovery early.
Hotel recovery is one of the most believable paid-value buckets because it turns room and booking problems into fixable next steps.

notes: This lane started as a prepared-not-live premium scaffold and was promoted into the live 500-family Viet pack during the autonomous completion pass.
The preparedDelta math remains useful as the historical size of this lane.
The preparedBoundaryIfPromoted field below is historical pre-promotion staging math, not the current live boundary.
